name: Inbound Carrier Sales
description: Acme Logistics carrier sales — Outbound Voice Agent + Predefined Webhook (HR Voice Agent template pattern). `to` and `from_number` both set to the org's Onboarding number (+16282142490) so the trunk's outbound-routability precheck passes; HR's editor Web Call button substitutes browser audio for the actual dial-out.

spec_alignment.spec: Do not buy a phone number on the platform. Use the web call trigger feature.
spec_alignment.shape: Outbound Voice Agent (event 0192e5dc-090a-7f57-87a0-76308ed6ef28) + Predefined Webhook trigger (event b329e750-...). Both `to` and `from_number` reference the org's pre-provisioned Onboarding number — no new phone-number purchase. HR's editor Web Call button creates a browser audio session that the agent picks up in place of the outbound dial. This matches the structure of HR's pre-built `Voice Agent` template in the org.
alternatives_tried_and_why_they_didnt_wo: Inbound Voice Agent + Predefined Webhook → editor warning 'Looks like you don't have any node selected for inbound calls' and no audio routed; the Predefined Webhook trigger isn't a recognized call source for the Inbound Voice Agent.
Inbound Voice Agent + Inbound to number trigger → requires a phone number with an inbound SIP trunk. The org's only number has Inbound Trunk: none and the spec forbids buying a new one.
Outbound Voice Agent + `to`=`{{trigger.carrier_phone}}` → Web Call test doesn't inject any value into trigger params; `to` resolved empty; outbound precheck failed with 'invalid phone number: 2'.
Outbound Voice Agent + `to`=`+15555550100` (RFC 7042 test number) → precheck rejects: 'invalid phone number: +15555550100: invalid outbound phone number'. The check is routability, not just format.

CURRENT: Outbound Voice Agent + `to`=`+16282142490` (Onboarding self-loop) → the trunk recognizes its own number and the precheck passes; Web Call test's browser-audio substitution kicks in instead of an actual dial.

agent.name: Riley
agent.initial_message: Hi, thanks for calling Acme Logistics carrier sales — this is Riley. What lane are you running today?
